nodes.name: Structuration STC par Destinataire
nodes.notes: Groupe les STC par destinataire avec escalade : SALARIE / SUPERIEUR / FARHAT / BAALLAH / DGA / PDG

nodes.name: Génération Messages Multilingues STC
nodes.notes: Génère les messages email + Telegram en FRA/ARA/ENG pour tous les niveaux d'escalade STC

nodes.name: Envoi Email STC
nodes.notes: Envoi email avec CC selon escalade

nodes.name: No Op No Chat ID STC
Envoi Telegram STC
nodes.notes: Envoi Telegram au destinataire final (principal ou CC)

parameters.query:
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- SITUATION DE CARRIÈRE (STC) — YSTCDON
-- Multi-destination : une ligne par niveau d'escalade actif
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        stc.YNUMSTC_0           AS numero_stc,
        stc.YDATE_0             AS date_demande,
        stc.CREDATTIM_0         AS date_creation,
        stc.CREUSR_0            AS utilisateur_createur,

        stc.YSAL_0              AS code_salarie,
        stc.YNOMSAL_0           AS nom_salarie,
        stc.XDTE_0              AS date_entree,
        stc.YPOSTE_0            AS poste,
        stc.YSALBASE_0          AS salaire_base,
        stc.YNETP_0             AS net_payer,

        x.XEMAIL_0              AS email_salarie,
        x.YTELE_0               AS tel_salarie,
        x.YSUP_0                AS code_superieur,

        xx.XSAL_0               AS code_sup,
        xx.XNAMSAL_0            AS nom_superieur,
        xx.XPRENOM_0            AS prenom_superieur,
        xx.XEMAIL_0             AS email_superieur,
        xx.YTELE_0              AS tel_superieur,

        pdg.XSAL_0              AS code_pdg,
        pdg.XNAMSAL_0           AS nom_pdg,
        pdg.XPRENOM_0           AS prenom_pdg,
        pdg.XEMAIL_0            AS email_pdg,
        pdg.YTELE_0             AS telephone_pdg,

        dga.XSAL_0              AS code_dga,
        dga.XNAMSAL_0           AS nom_dga,
        dga.XPRENOM_0           AS prenom_dga,
        dga.XEMAIL_0            AS email_dga,
        dga.YTELE_0             AS telephone_dga,

        farhat.XSAL_0           AS code_farhat,
        farhat.XNAMSAL_0        AS nom_farhat,
        farhat.XPRENOM_0        AS prenom_farhat,
        farhat.XEMAIL_0         AS email_farhat,
        farhat.YTELE_0          AS telephone_farhat,

        baallah.XSAL_0          AS code_baallah,
        baallah.XNAMSAL_0       AS nom_baallah,
        baallah.XPRENOM_0       AS prenom_baallah,
        baallah.XEMAIL_0        AS email_baallah,
        baallah.YTELE_0         AS telephone_baallah,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = stc.YSAL_0) AS chat_id_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = stc.YSAL_0) AS langue_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = stc.YSAL_0) AS bot_salarie,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur,

        '8528101210'            AS chat_id_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS langue_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS bot_pdg,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_dga,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS langue_dga,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS bot_dga,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS langue_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS bot_farhat,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS langue_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS bot_baallah,

        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT)                                                             AS delai_int,
        DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), stc.CREDATTIM_0)                             AS date_limite,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, stc.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE())                                           AS jours_depuis_creation,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(),
            DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), stc.CREDATTIM_0))                        AS jours_restants,
        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) / 2                                                         AS seuil_dga

    FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[YSTCDON] stc

        LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL x
            ON x.XSAL_0 = stc.YSAL_0

        LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL xx
            ON xx.XSAL_0 = x.YSUP_0

        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0
            FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL
            WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDELSTC'
        ) P

        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
            FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066'
        ) pdg
        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
            FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949'
        ) dga
        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
            FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602'
        ) farhat
        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
            FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179'
        ) baallah

    WHERE
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[AOBJTXT] ao
            WHERE stc.YNUMSTC_0 = ao.IDENT1_0
              AND ao.ABREV_0 = 'YSST'
        )
        AND CAST(stc.CREDATTIM_0 AS DATE) >= '2024-01-01'
        AND stc.CREDATTIM_0 >= DATEADD(DAY, -CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), GETDATE())
)

SELECT *, 'SALARIE'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'SUPERIEUR' AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'FARHAT'    AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants BETWEEN 5 AND 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'BAALLAH'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'DGA'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'PDG'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 2

ORDER BY jours_restants ASC, niveau_escalade DESC;

nodes.name: Vérifier Données STC1
nodes.notes: Stoppe si aucun STC à notifier

nodes.name: Fin - Aucun STC à notifier1
nodes.notes: Aucun STC dans la fenêtre de notification
